name: Literature Review
description: Conducts systematic multi-database academic literature searches following PRISMA/SWARM protocols, screens and synthesises findings, verifies all citations, and generates a structured review report.
conditions: Requires access to academic databases (PubMed, bioRxiv, ChEMBL, or equivalent).

evidence.notes: Rouzrokh et al. (2025) — LatteReview: multi-agent framework for systematic review automation; modular agents for title/abstract screening, relevance scoring, and structured data extraction with RAG and multimodal support. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)

timeline.details: Re-graded evidence from https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.05468 as A (trustNumber: 85.0)
